phases.label: Discover
phases.description: Inventory target gateway routes, tests, and governance docs.

phases.label: Analyze
phases.description: Build prioritized gap matrix from API inventory and competitor capabilities.

phases.label: Design
phases.description: Write implementation brief aligned with target repo AGENTS.md contract.

phases.label: Implement
phases.description: Emit Cursor IDE work order for the top gap (you or Cursor Agent executes in TARGET_REPO).

phases.label: Validate
phases.description: Run agent self-tests (pytest) then TARGET_REPO gates (pytest, smoke, control coverage). Cycle fails if either layer fails.

phases.label: Release prep
phases.description: Prepare release decision draft and risk touchpoints.
